_comment: Per-unit platform costs used to calculate margin. Update to match your actual vendor pricing. Prices in USD.
_c_llm_input: Cost per 1,000 INPUT tokens to Claude (Haiku 4.5 current: $0.80/M input). Lower this for Haiku-only workloads.
_c_llm_output: Cost per 1,000 OUTPUT tokens. Haiku 4.5 current: $4.00/M output.
_c_voice_syn: TTS cost per 1,000 characters. Polly Neural currently ~$16/M chars via Twilio markup. Adjust when switching to ElevenLabs.
_c_stt: Speech-to-text cost per minute. Twilio enhanced STT is ~$0.012/min.
_c_platform_voice: Catch-all platform/voice minute charge. Adjust if voice provider bills separately.
_c_twilio_inbound: Twilio inbound toll-free or local per-minute rate (~$0.014/min US local, higher for toll-free).
_c_twilio_number: Monthly fee per Twilio number ($1.15 US local, $2.00 toll-free).
_c_sms: Per SMS segment (160 chars). Twilio US: ~$0.0083/segment outbound.
